ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country's currency */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the country */,
  "customs_office" TEXT /* Name of the main customs office */,
  "customs_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the customs office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., importer, exporter, customs broker) */,
  "vat_number" TEXT /* VAT or tax identification number */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company's website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hs_codes" (
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HS code */,
  "hs_code" TEXT /* HS code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the HS code */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the product */,
  "customs_regulation" TEXT /* Specific customs regulations for the HS code */,
  "tariff_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on applicable tariffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit code */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HS code the product is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company involved in the shipment */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country involved in the shipment */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HS code for the product */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being shipped */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipment */,
  "shipment_type" TEXT /* Type of shipment (import or export) */,
  "incoterm" TEXT /* Incoterm used for the shipment */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the shipment */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping */,
  "insurance_value" REAL /* Insured value of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_hs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code_id") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customs_clearances" (
  "clearance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customs clearance */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being cleared */,
  "clearance_date" TEXT /* Date of the customs clearance */,
  "clearance_status" TEXT /* Status of the customs clearance */,
  "customs_office" TEXT /* Name of the customs office where clearance is processed */,
  "customs_officer" TEXT /* Name of the customs officer handling the clearance */,
  "customs_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for customs clearance */,
  "clearance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the clearance process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clearance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customs_clearances_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "document_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "clearance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customs clearance the document belongs to */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of document (e.g., commercial invoice, bill of lading) */,
  "document_date" TEXT /* Date of the document */,
  "document_number" TEXT /* Unique number for the document */,
  "document_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "document_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the document */,
  "document_status" TEXT /* Status of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("document_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_clearance_id FOREIGN KEY ("clearance_id") REFERENCES customs_clearances ("clearance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tariffs" (
  "tariff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tariff */,
  "hs_code_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HS code the tariff applies to */,
  "tariff_rate" REAL /* Rate of the tariff */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff becomes effective */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the tariff expires */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments on the tariff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tariff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tariffs_hs_code_id FOREIGN KEY ("hs_code_id") REFERENCES hs_codes ("hs_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_agreements" (
  "agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade agreement */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the agreement applies to */,
  "agreement_name" TEXT /* Name of the trade agreement */,
  "agreement_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade agreement */,
  "agreement_type" TEXT /* Type of trade agreement */,
  "agreement_status" TEXT /* Status of the agreement */,
  "agreement_text" TEXT /* Full text or summary of the agreement */,
  "agreement_file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_agreements_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment status */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the status belongs to */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date of the status update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the shipment */,
  "status_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the status update */,
  "status_update_by" TEXT /* User who updated the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_status_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the shipment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment route */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the route belongs to */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Departure port of the shipment */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Arrival port of the shipment */,
  "route_date" TEXT /* Date of the shipment route */,
  "route_distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  "estimated_travel_time" TEXT /* Estimated travel time */,
  "route_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the route */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_routes_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_containers" (
  "container_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment container */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the container belongs to */,
  "container_type" TEXT /* Type of container */,
  "container_size" TEXT /* Size of the container */,
  "container_seal_number" TEXT /* Seal number of the container */,
  "container_weight" REAL /* Weight of the container */,
  "container_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the container */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("container_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_containers_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipment_goods" (
  "goods_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment goods */,
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipment the goods belong to */,
  "goods_description" TEXT /* Description of the goods */,
  "goods_weight" REAL /* Weight of the goods */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the goods */,
  "unit_value" REAL /* Unit value of the goods */,
  "total_value" REAL /* Total value of the goods */,
  "goods_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the goods */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("goods_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipment_goods_shipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipment_id") REFERENCES shipments ("shipment_id")
)
